rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini for header text.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini for header text.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini for all fields.

Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash due to better visual match for ditto marks and colon (vs. gpt-5-mini's description and punctuation). Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading is more accurate.
Added as a distinct subtotal, identified by gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash noted its presence but did not extract it as a separate row. Visually confirmed as a clear, underlined subtotal on the page.

Chosen from gemini-flash. 'Furniture' is clearly an underlined header on its own line, preceding its associated amount on the next line. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this header with the subsequent amount and classified it as an 'entry'.

Added as a distinct entry representing the Furniture amount. Only gemini-flash correctly identified this as a separate entry from the 'Furniture' header. Visual verification confirms the amount '3000' and periods for zero shillings and pence.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini for all fields of the primary entry amount. gpt-5-mini's higher confidence is justified as the primary amount is clear.
Added as a distinct subtotal, identified by gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash noted its presence but did not extract it as a separate row. Visually confirmed as a clear, underlined subtotal on the page.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini for header text.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Both correctly interpret the dot as zero pence.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms '444' is clear despite gpt-5-mini's slight uncertainty.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms '1 8 2' is clear, justifying higher confidence.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini for all fields.

Overridden based on visual verification. The amount is clearly '3 5 .' with the dot indicating zero pence. gpt-5-mini correctly reads the values (3 5 0), while gemini-flash misread the shillings as 3 and pence as 5.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini for all fields.
Amounts in consensus. Description 'Furniture Hire' taken from gemini-flash, visually confirmed as more accurate than 'Hic' from gpt-5-mini.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini for all fields of the primary entry amount. The amounts are clear.
Added as a distinct subtotal. gpt-5-mini identified the row but misread pounds as '771'; visual verification clearly shows '977'. gemini-flash noted its presence but did not extract.
Amounts in consensus. Description '£' taken from gemini-flash, as the symbol is clearly visible on the total line and should be captured. gpt-5-mini left the description empty.

rows.description: duly kept in proper books of Account and that the account of the financial condition of the College.
rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini for description and row type. Visual inspection indicates a slightly higher confidence is warranted for the legibility of the cursive text.
Extracted from gemini-flash, correcting 'Lo.' to 'W.' based on visual verification. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this line with the auditing firm's name. The 'W' is clear upon close inspection.

Extracted from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this with the signature line. Visual verification confirms ambiguity in 'Pixley' and 'Heasq', but gemini-flash's transcription is a reasonable interpretation, noting the 'q'.
Description taken from gpt-5-mini, as visual verification confirms a dash/hyphen between '17' and '1896' rather than 'th'. Both agree on other aspects.
